hero.title:
Create Your Unforgettable 
 Water Adventure
hero.description: Experience the legendary Nile River in Aswan like never before. Kayaking, stand-up paddleboarding, and exploring with the best water sports experience in Egypt.

redSea.title: Why Choose Us for Your Water Adventure?
redSea.description: Experience the Nile like never before with the best water sports experience in Egypt. We're not just a place for water sports. We're passionate locals who want to share the magic of the Nile with the world.

amaala.title: Your Journey to Exceptional Destinations Starts Here
amaala.description: From serene sunset tours to thrilling rapids, we have the perfect adventure for relaxation and rejuvenation.
amaala.safetyDescription: All equipment is certified and regularly inspected. Our guides are trained professionals.

experiences.subtitle: Our Services
experiences.title: From serene sunset tours to thrilling rapids, we have the perfect adventure for everyone
experiences.testimonialIntro: What our adventurers say — don't just take our word for it, hear from the thousands who have experienced the magic of the Nile with us.
experiences.kayakDesc: Explore the Nile in our comfortable single and double kayaks. Single or double options, beginner-friendly, all equipment included.
experiences.supDesc: Glide through calm waters on a paddleboard. Full-body workout, perfect for photos, calm waterways.
experiences.waterbikeDesc: Pedal your way across the Nile on our water bikes. Easy to learn, perfect for families, no experience needed.

faq.subtitle: FAQ
faq.title: Everything You Need to Know
faq.description: Clear answers to the most common questions our guests ask before their trip
faq.q1: How can I book a water trip?
faq.a1: You can book directly through our website by clicking the 'Book Now' button, selecting your preferred trip and booking date. Our support team is also available 24/7 via phone or email to help you complete your booking.
faq.a2: Yes, we offer special discounts for groups of 8 or more. Please contact us directly for a custom quote that suits your group size and requirements.
faq.q3: What is the cancellation and refund policy?
faq.a3: You can cancel your booking for free up to 48 hours before the trip. Cancellations within 48 hours incur a 50% cancellation fee. No-shows without prior notice are non-refundable.
faq.q4: What does the package price include?
faq.a4: Basic packages include: necessary equipment and gear, activity insurance, a specialized tour guide, and drinking water throughout the trip. Some premium packages may include meals or accommodation as specified in the details.
faq.q5: When is the best time to visit?
faq.a5: The best times to visit Aswan are from October to April, when temperatures are moderate and suitable for water activities. Summer months (June - August) should be avoided due to high temperatures.
faq.q6: Are activities available for all skill levels?
faq.a6: Absolutely! We offer activities for all levels, from beginners to professionals. A short training session is provided before each activity to ensure a safe and enjoyable experience for all participants.
faq.a7: We accept credit card payments (Visa, Mastercard), bank transfers, and cash on arrival. Installment payment options are also available for some larger packages.
faq.q8: Do you provide accommodation and transportation services?
faq.a8: Yes, we offer comprehensive packages that include hotel transfers and various accommodation options ranging from luxury resorts to Nile-side stays. Contact us to explore available packages.

footer.brandDescription: Create your unforgettable water adventure on the legendary Nile River. Enjoy the magic of Aswan from a unique perspective.

supplierOnboarding.title: Supplier Setup
supplierOnboarding.description: Complete a quick setup so your trips can be booked.

supplierOnboarding.equipmentCapacityHint: Set the maximum count available for bookings per day.
supplierOnboarding.equipmentCapacityRelationNote: Capacity means number of equipment units, while guests means number of people.
supplierOnboarding.equipmentCapacityKayakNote: Kayak example: single kayak = 1 guest, double kayak = 2 guests.
supplierOnboarding.equipmentCapacityWaterCycleNote: Water bike example: single = 1 guest, double = 2 guests.
supplierOnboarding.equipmentCapacitySupNote: SUP is usually 1 guest per board (some operators allow an extra small child).

myBookings.cancelDescription: Cancellation is allowed up to 24 hours before the trip. A refund request will be submitted to the administration.

bookingSuccess.title: Booking Successful!
bookingSuccess.thankYou: Thank you for booking with us
bookingSuccess.description: Your request has been received and will be processed shortly. You will receive a confirmation via email.
bookingSuccess.step1: A booking confirmation will be sent to your email
bookingSuccess.step2: We will call you one day before the trip
bookingSuccess.step3: Enjoy your experience on the Nile River
bookingSuccess.noDestinationFallbackBody: Elephantine Island — tap to open in Google Maps or copy the link.
bookingSuccess.genericRefundPolicy: Cancellations follow the terms shown on your selected trip. If you cancel at least 24 hours before the trip, you may be eligible for a refund according to that policy.
bookingSuccess.refundable: This trip is marked as refundable; refund eligibility depends on timing and the trip policy above.
bookingSuccess.nonRefundable: This trip is marked as non-refundable except where required by law or at our discretion.
bookingSuccess.cancel24hRule: You can request cancellation in your account up to 24 hours before the trip date. After that, cancellation may not be possible.
bookingSuccess.whatsappPrefill: Hi, I need help with my booking. Reference: {ref}
bookingSuccess.supportHours: We usually reply within a few hours during business hours.
bookingSuccess.tipArriveEarly: Arrive 10–15 minutes before your slot so we can brief you and fit equipment.
bookingSuccess.tipBringSunscreen: Bring sun protection, water, and comfortable clothes suitable for the activity.
bookingSuccess.tipBringSwimwear: Swimwear or quick-dry clothing is recommended for water activities.
bookingSuccess.tipLifeJacket: Life jackets and safety equipment are provided where required.
bookingSuccess.mapsUnavailable: Map link unavailable for this stop — contact us for exact meeting details.
